texto: What I really wanted... wasn't fame. All I wanted was to know... whether or not I should've been born. Huff... I can't even shout anymore. Luffy, listen to my next words carefully. Tell everybody what I say to you. Pops!! Fellow pirates!! And... Luffy... I've always been such a hopeless person... huff huff... I was demon spawn... the son of the devil!! Thank you... for loving me!!
explicacao: Orientação direta de Portugas D. Ace sobre temas ligados a gratidao. A afirmação “What I really wanted... wasn't fame. All I wanted was to know... whether or not I should've been …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a gratidao, fame, love, útil em momentos de love e luffy.
